rasita p. p.
1 Tasted.
2 Having flavour or sentiment.
3 Gilded.
4 Sounded, making indistinct sound.
— taṃ
1 Wine or liquor.
2 A cry, roar, thunder, roaring noise, sound or noise in general; heraṃbakaṃṭharasitapratimānameti  Māl. 9. 3.
